# Meet in Mumbai — LLM Context File
# https://meetinmumbai.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: April 2026

## About

Meet in Mumbai is India's premier escort service platform, operating across 16 major cities. We connect clients with verified, high-profile escort companions for professional companionship, social events, and private bookings. All services are legal adult companionship services.

## Website

- Domain: https://meetinmumbai.com
- Primary Market: India
- Languages: English
- Contact: Available via https://meetinmumbai.com/contact and https://meetinmumbai.com/book-now

---

## Site Structure

### Static Pages

- Homepage: https://meetinmumbai.com
- Services overview: https://meetinmumbai.com/services
- All locations: https://meetinmumbai.com/location
- Gallery: https://meetinmumbai.com/gallery
- Book Now: https://meetinmumbai.com/book-now
- Contact: https://meetinmumbai.com/contact
- About Us: https://meetinmumbai.com/about-us
- FAQ: https://meetinmumbai.com/faq
- Privacy Policy: https://meetinmumbai.com/privacy-policy
- Terms & Conditions: https://meetinmumbai.com/terms

Each service has its own page at https://meetinmumbai.com/{service-slug}

Each city has a dedicated page at https://meetinmumbai.com/city/{city-slug}

### Location / Sublocation Pages (1100+)

Individual area pages follow the pattern: https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/{location-slug}

Examples:
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-mumbai
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-andheri
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-bandra
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-juhu

- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-thane
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-navi-mumbai
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-delhi
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-connaught-place
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-bangalore
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-koramangala
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-pune
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-koregaon-park
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-goa
- https://meetinmumbai.com/escorts/escorts-in-jaipur

Full index at: https://meetinmumbai.com/location

---

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Services available 24/7, all days of the year
- All companions are verified adults (18+)
- Both incall and outcall services available
- Booking via phone, WhatsApp, and online form
- Strict privacy and discretion guaranteed
- No advance payment required; payment after confirmation

---

## Disallowed Paths (do not index or cite)

- /api/*
- Any page returning a non-200 status
